label: garden_plan
value: With a generous budget, planning to get high-quality seeds and plants for the upcoming planting season.

label: food_preferences
value: Interested in vegetarian recipes using fresh garden produce, specifically tips on keeping vegetables crisp and flavorful when cooking, and suggestions for sides like steamed rice or quinoa, garlic naan, sesame seeds, crushed nuts, pickled vegetables, crusty bread, salad, herb butter, roasted sweet potatoes, grilled corn on the cob, avocado salsa, and quinoa or couscous salad.

label: hobbies_and_projects
value: Enjoys playing bridge and is now looking forward to playing more casual bridge games with friends at home, interested in recommendations for fun and easy bridge games. Recommended online resources include Bridge Base Online (BBO), Duplicate Bridge app, Bridge Club Live (BCL), Skat Free, Hearts app, Cribbage Pro, Pinochle app, Tabletop Simulator, Facebook Gaming, and Tabletopia.

label: book_club_details
value: Meets monthly with about fifteen members, looking for a good historical fiction novel for the next meeting.

value: Considering finding a mentor or a more experienced individual within the community to guide in genealogy research.

label: community_involvement
value: Currently organizes between three to five events each month but is considering scaling back to one or two events per month to dedicate more time to hobbies and genealogy research.
